seoTitle: GMP Audit Readiness Kit — included with Life Science Atlas Pro
seoDesc: A structured GMP audit-readiness toolkit for QC/QA teams: preparation guide, gap analysis, CAPA templates, interview prompts, and a mock audit walkthrough.

hero.subtitle: A practical QC/QA working pack for readiness triage, CAPA planning and interview rehearsal. Adapt every template to your site and current applicable requirements.

items.title: A deadline is close, but the preparation basis is fragmented
items.desc: Turn scattered checklists, owners and evidence requests into one prioritized readiness plan.

items.title: Potential gaps exist, but their impact is unclear
items.desc: Triage observations by evidence, risk and required follow-up before deciding what needs formal action.

items.title: The team knows the work, but has not rehearsed the explanation
items.desc: Practice concise, evidence-linked answers without inventing certainty or memorizing a script.

includes.heading: What's in the Kit?
includes.subtitle: 5 working files plus a Start Here guide — all included in your Pro subscription

items.title: Start Here
items.desc: An inventory and recommended sequence for using the files without treating them as site-approved procedures.

items.title: GMP Audit Readiness Guide
items.desc: A preparation framework from initial triage through audit day and written-response planning.

items.title: SOP Gap Analysis (Excel/Sheets)
items.desc: Score 20 quality-system elements; the sheet computes your % readiness and surfaces your worst gaps.

items.title: 10 CAPA Planning Templates
items.desc: Draft structures for organizing problem statements, investigation logic, actions and effectiveness checks.

items.title: Audit Interview Q&A Prompts
items.desc: 50+ rehearsal prompts with example answer structures that must be grounded in your controlled evidence.

items.title: Mock Audit Walkthrough
items.desc: A staged walkthrough that helps teams identify evidence, ownership and handoff gaps before an inspection.

items.title: Replace the blank page
items.text: Use a shared structure for readiness triage, evidence requests and response planning before site-specific review.

items.title: Rehearse the evidence path
items.text: Practice who owns each answer, which controlled record supports it and where an unresolved gap must be escalated.

items.title: Keep decisions qualified
items.text: Templates separate observations, assumptions and proposed actions so QA and authorized reviewers can make the controlled decision.

pricing.launchNote: Included with Life Science Atlas Pro
pricing.priceNote: Pro unlocks this kit, other available toolkits and the evidence library • Cancel anytime
pricing.standards: Use current applicable requirements and site procedures

whoFor.heading: Who is this for?
items: QC/QA professionals coordinating evidence and readiness actions
QC supervisors preparing a team for a GMP inspection
QA managers organizing gap triage and response planning
Cross-functional site teams aligning owners, records and escalation paths
whoFor.notFor: Sites seeking a substitute for current regulations, controlled procedures, qualified judgment or QA approval.

items.a: The kit provides a general GMP-oriented preparation structure. Your site must map each prompt to the current regulations, licenses, market commitments and controlled procedures that actually apply.

items.q: How do I get the files?
items.a: The kit is part of Life Science Atlas Pro. Once you subscribe, every file is available instantly from your dashboard downloads — no separate purchase, and you keep access for as long as your Pro subscription is active.

items.q: I'm a new QC — can I use it?
items.a: Yes, as a learning and preparation aid under supervision. Gap classification, CAPA decisions and inspection responses still require qualified site review.
No. It helps organize preparation and surface open evidence; it cannot verify site implementation, approve a CAPA or predict an inspector's conclusions.

finalCta.note: Still have questions? Reach out directly.
